decision_commentary: All required schema fields present: systems_status (structural, electrical, lighting, water — all four required systems), conditional_systems=['irrigation','solar','av'], all_inputs_confirmed=true, conflicts_resolved=true. Completeness 5: all four required systems (structural, electrical, lighting, water) present and confirmed complete; all three conditional systems addressed (irrigation — correct per residential template default; solar — correct per seed data special_features; av/smart home — correct per seed data special_features); no pending consultant inputs (all_inputs_confirmed=true). Accuracy 5: package explicitly declared complete and ready ('Ready for executive plans phase'); all consultant inputs confirmed. The engineer fields note 'TBD — to be contracted by client per SOW' — this is correct behavior per SOW exclusions (engineers contract directly with client; Oficio Taller coordinates). Clarity 5: conflicts_resolved=true; no coordination conflicts identified — engineering drawings integrated with architectural set. State sync 3: simulated run. Timing 5: package complete before Bruno begins contractor pricing (per simulated timeline, engineering completes at end of Phase 3, budget alignment follows in Segment G). Decision readiness 5: Bruno can proceed to contractor pricing immediately. No auto-fail conditions triggered — all required systems present, no undeclared pending inputs.
